name: HR_ALL_POSITIONS_F_
description: Positions main table storing all position attributes

columns.Name: POSITION_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: CATEGORY_CODE
columns.Comments: Extensible Flexfield Category Code

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRW_BUSINESS_UNITS table.

columns.Name: POSITION_CODE
columns.Comments: Code of the position.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS_F

columns.Name: UNION_ID
columns.Comments: UNION_ID

columns.Name: COLLECTIVE_AGREEMENT_ID
columns.Comments: COLLECTIVE_AGREEMENT_ID

columns.Name: JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_JOBS_F table.

columns.Name: LOCATION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_LOCATIONS table.

columns.Name: ENTRY_GRADE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the entry grade.

columns.Name: ENTRY_STEP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the entry step.

columns.Name: SUPERVISOR_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the manager.

columns.Name: SUPERVISOR_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the manager's assignment.

columns.Name: GRADE_LADDER_ID
columns.Comments: Grade Ladder

columns.Name: ACTION_OCCURRENCE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_ACTION_OCCURRENCES.

columns.Name: ACTIVE_STATUS
columns.Comments: Indicates if a position is active or inactive.

columns.Name: HIRING_STATUS
columns.Comments: Indicates the hiring status of the position, for example approved or frozen.

columns.Name: POSITION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates the type of the position for example pooled or single.

columns.Name: PERMANENT_TEMPORARY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if a position is regular or temporary.

columns.Name: FULL_PART_TIME
columns.Comments: Indicates if a position is full-time or part-time.

columns.Name: FTE
columns.Comments: Position full time equivalent.

columns.Name: CALCULATE_FTE
columns.Comments: Indicates whether FTE should be calculated for this position.

columns.Name: MAX_PERSONS
columns.Comments: Position headcount.

columns.Name: STANDARD_WORKING_HOURS
columns.Comments: Number of standard working hours.

columns.Name: STANDARD_WORKING_FREQUENCY
columns.Comments: Frequency for the standard working hours.

columns.Name: WORKING_HOURS
columns.Comments: Number of actual working hours.

columns.Name: FREQUENCY
columns.Comments: Frequency for the actual working hours.

columns.Name: STD_ANNUAL_WORKING_DURATION
columns.Comments: The standard annual working duration for the position.

columns.Name: ANNUAL_WORKING_DURATION_UNITS
columns.Comments: The unit of measure in hours, days, weeks, or months for the standard annual working duration and annual working duration.

columns.Name: ANNUAL_WORKING_DURATION
columns.Comments: The annual working duration for the position.

columns.Name: TIME_NORMAL_START
columns.Comments: Regular start time.

columns.Name: TIME_NORMAL_FINISH
columns.Comments: Regular end time.

columns.Name: PROBATION_PERIOD
columns.Comments: Number of the probation period.

columns.Name: PROBATION_PERIOD_UNIT_CD
columns.Comments: Unit of measure code for the probation period.

columns.Name: BARGAINING_UNIT_CD
columns.Comments: Code of the bargaining unit.

columns.Name: POSITION_SYNCHRONIZATION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if a position is enabled for synchronization. This is not in use.

columns.Name: SECURITY_CLEARANCE
columns.Comments: Indicates the security clearance of a position.

columns.Name: OVERLAP_ALLOWED
columns.Comments: Indicates if overlap is allowed.

columns.Name: SEASONAL_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if a position is seasonal.

columns.Name: SEASONAL_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Seasonal start date.

columns.Name: SEASONAL_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Seasonal end date.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: ASSIGNMENT_CATEGORY

columns.Name: COST_CENTER
columns.Comments: Indicates Cost Center

columns.Name: DELEGATE_POSITION_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates Delegate Position id

columns.Name: BUDGETED_POSITION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates flag for budgeted flag

columns.Name: BUDGET_AMOUNT
columns.Comments: Indicates budget amount

columns.Name: BUDGET_AMOUNT_CURRENCY
columns.Comments: Used to identify currency for Budget Amount

columns.Name: FUNDED_BY_EXISTING_POSITION
columns.Comments: Flag to indicate funded by existing position

columns.Name: REQUISITION_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the Requisition template.

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
